title: Section Structure — Adding Headings
description: Organize your portfolio into sections using headings. Keep your h1 for your name, then add h2 headings for 'About Me', 'My Projects', and 'Contact'. Add a short paragraph under each h2 section to describe what that section will contain.
starter_code:
# Portfolio Website — Step 2: Section Headings # Add h2 headings for About Me, My Projects, and Contact. # Add a paragraph under each h2. html = """ My Portfolio

Your Name

Welcome to my portfolio!

""" print(html)
test_code:
assert '

' in html.lower() and '

' in html.lower(), 'Must include an

heading' assert html.lower().count('

') >= 3, f'Need at least 3

headings, found {html.lower().count("

")}' assert 'about' in html.lower(), 'Must include an About Me section' assert 'project' in html.lower(), 'Must include a Projects section' assert 'contact' in html.lower(), 'Must include a Contact section' assert html.lower().count('

') >= 4, f'Need at least 4 paragraphs (1 welcome + 3 section descriptions), found {html.lower().count("

")}'
acceptance_criteria: h1 heading is present with your name
At least 3 h2 headings for About Me, My Projects, and Contact
Each h2 section has a descriptive paragraph below it
Heading hierarchy is correct (h1 then h2s)
hints:
Put a

paragraph after each

to describe the section
The h1 should stay at the top for your name
